author: Sree Harinandan
name: Compiled LeakyReLU2 + Warmdown300 (1xRTX4090)
blurb: Non-record 1xRTX4090 submission documenting a 29-experiment search. The best compiled 300s run uses LeakyReLU2, quarter batch sizing, and warmdown 300 to reach 1.42394278 post-quant val_bpb under the 16MB artifact cap.
